title: Section 52F
content: If any director or officer of the insurer or any other person fails to deliver to the Administrator any books of account, registers or any other documents, in his custody relating to the business of the insurer the management of which has vested in the Administrator, or retains any property of such insurer he shall be 1[liable to penalty of rupees ten thousand each day during which such failure continues or rupees ten lakh, whichever is less].]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 63, ibid., for "punishable with imprisonment which may extend to six months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both" (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).
